title: Chicago tract risk summary
executiveSummary: This tract is currently rated elevated for the next 30 days, driven primarily by property-crime pressure and reinforced by one official live bulletin.
riskDrivers: Property crime density is above the recent tract baseline.
Nightlife corridor exposure increases short-term volatility.
Nearby tracts show similar short-term pressure.
trustNotes: Confidence is moderate rather than high because live signals and verified history are not fully aligned.
Completeness is high for the verified historical inputs used in the current score.
compareSummary: Compared with a moderate-risk control tract, this tract is currently modeled about fourteen points higher overall.
